description:
You are a flight dynamics engineer for the Artemis program. The Human Landing System (HLS) is currently in a Near Rectilinear Halo Orbit (NRHO) proxy and needs to transfer to a 100 km circular Low Lunar Orbit (LLO). Using the mission specifications and initial spacecraft state in ~/Desktop/hls_mission_spec.txt, design a two-impulse transfer to achieve a 100 km circular orbit (Radius magnitude = 1838.14 km, Eccentricity = 0.0) using a point-mass lunar gravity model. Save the GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/hls_transfer_script.script and write a summary report to ~/GMAT_output/hls_transfer_results.txt containing exactly these lines:
Burn1_DeltaV_mps: <value>
Burn2_DeltaV_mps: <value>
Total_DeltaV_mps: <sum of the two burns>
Final_SMA_km: <value>
Final_ECC: <value>

Login: username=ga, password=password123
